PROVISIONAL: Synthetic 10-case set to prove the eval harness only. The real exam is the team's 150 labelled historical emails (BLOCKERS.md: triage-golden-set). email-triage CANNOT leave shadow mode on this set.

input.subject: Bio + pricing update
